app.title: Small Demo Manager
home.welcome.title: Welcome
home.welcome.text:
Analyze Counter-Strike 2 demo files (.dem) — extract match statistics, voice audio, calculate bitfield masks, and more.

Drag & drop a .dem file onto the file path field below to get started.

audio.saved_path.msg:
Saved voice files path is not configured.

Go to Settings → Paths and set a folder first.

about.title: About
about.description:
Small Demo Manager — a tool for analyzing Counter-Strike 2 demo files.

Originally developed for the CS2 community to simplify demo analysis, voice extraction, and spectator bitfield calculation.
about.author: Original Author: pythaeusone
about.version.title: Version
about.support.title: Support
howto.bitfield.title: Bitfield-Calc
howto.bitfield.text: Drop a .dem file, select players from the lists, copy the generated console command, paste it in CS2 to hear selected players.
howto.match.title: Match-Results
howto.match.text: After loading a demo, switch to this tab to see detailed match statistics for all players.
howto.audio.title: Audio-Player
howto.audio.text: Click Extract Audio to extract voice data from the demo. Files are organized by player. Double-click to play. Right-click to save.
howto.settings.title: Settings
howto.settings.text: Configure dark/light theme, set CS2 demo path, manage saved voice files location, and register shell context menu.
msg.not_sourcetv: Demo loaded. Voice extraction may be limited (not SourceTV).
